{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = White Fox Remnant
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] nurtured a [[White Fox Remnant]] from [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
